a.xlink:title: Orchestrates lifecycle management for all player-bound UI components.
Graphical zone for the player's hand, supporting horizontal and vertical layouts.
Polymorphic interface for player-bound UI components managed by PlayerMenu.
Base class for zones where cards are laid out and individually interactable.
Base graphics item for zones that contain cards.
Base class for graphical card items, providing shared rendering, identity, and interaction logic.
